landing.headline: Show up. Move. Today.
landing.subhead: ShowUp2Move matches you with nearby players for football, basketball, tennis and more. AI does the matching. You just show up.
landing.live.title: Real product. Real venues.
landing.live.football.title: Football today
landing.live.tennis.title: Pick a venue
landing.live.map.title: Public venues
landing.how.title: Four taps from idea to kickoff.
landing.how.step1.title: Sign up
landing.how.step1.body: Username + password. A recovery code, never an email blast.
landing.how.step2.title: Set sports + location
landing.how.step2.body: Pick what you play. Drop a fuzzy home pin. We never store the exact one.
landing.how.step3.title: ShowUpToday?
landing.how.step3.body: One tap each morning. Yes — we look for nearby players right now.
landing.how.step4.title: Match + meet
landing.how.step4.body: Captain auto-creates the event. Vote on the venue. Show up. Game on.
landing.why.title: Built for Saturday-morning energy.
landing.why.ai.title: AI matchmaking
landing.why.ai.body: Find groups by sport, skill, and proximity in seconds.
landing.why.venues.title: Real venues
landing.why.venues.body: Suggested venues with weather, price tier, and directions.
landing.why.show.title: Just show up
landing.why.show.body: Captain auto-creates the event. You confirm. Game on.
landing.footer.tagline: ShowUp2Move. Spontaneous sports matching for Timișoara.
leaderboard.title: Players this week
leaderboard.body: Points are awarded for showing up, captaining, and keeping streaks alive. Stub leaderboard — real ranking lands with the matching telemetry.
calendar.title: Your calendar
calendar.body: Confirmed events you said yes to. Each row exports a clean .ics you can drop into Apple/Google Calendar.
calendar.empty.title: No events yet
calendar.empty.body: Say yes on Today and we'll find you a group. Confirmed events show up here with a one-tap calendar export.
